headings: UNCONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON PROGRESS PAYMENT
text: The undersigned being duly sworn, states that (s)he is an authorized agent for [SUBCONTRACTOR NAME] ('Subcontractor'). Pursuant to its Subcontract Agreement with Contractor, and in consideration of the sum of $ Must match the amount EXACTLY as it appeared on Form A in the previous month's Pay Application , Subcontractor hereby waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished through Date of Draw listed on Form A in the previous month's Pay Application (the 'Release Date') to GS Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor') , for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') owned GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC ('Owner') being constructed on the following real property (the 'Property'):
